Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Compelling Plaintiff'S Further Responses To Form And Special Interrogatories, Set 1: For An Award Of Monetar Sanctions In The Amount Of $1,020.0 Against Plaintiff, Onomen Odiahi And His Sttorney Of Record Michael O. Akhidenor, Esq; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Gene Stone In Support Thereof; Separate Stament Of Disputed Questions And Answers
Off Calendar Aug-20-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Cole Heggi, Homan & Stone, appearing for Defendants(s) Fernando Rodriguez et al, Telephone (909)307-9380 (via CourtCall)
No other appearance.

The Court rules as follows:

DEFENDANTS DOUGLAS RODRIGUEZ, HERMES LAZO'S Motion For An Order Compelling Plaintiff'S Further Responses To Form And Special Interrogatories, Set 1: For An Award Of Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $1,020.0 Against Plaintiff, Onomen Odiahi And His Attorney Of Record Michael O. Akhidenor, Esq.

Motion is moot due to service of plaintiff's supplemental responses to defendants form and special interrogatories, set one. Request for sanctions is granted due to the fact that the plaintiffs responses were untimely served. Prevailing party to submit form of order that complies with CRC 3.1312 and email the order to Judge Pro Tem David McDonald at davidmcdonald@prodigy.net. *After hearing an order is signed* (See scanned order for details)

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)
